description: Verify the login page loads and displays 'Welcome back'
expected_result: Login page loads with 'Welcome back' heading

description: Login with valid credentials navigates to dashboard
steps:
1. Enter valid license
2. Enter valid password
3. Submit

description: Verify signup page loads with 'Create account' heading
Create a new doctor account with valid details
steps:
1. Fill all fields with valid data
2. Submit
actual_result: Account already exists (expected for repeat runs)

description: Verify forgot password page loads
Unauthenticated user visiting /dashboard is redirected to /login
Dashboard loads successfully after login
Verify dashboard home tab displays main content
expected_result: Dashboard title or Patients heading shown

description: Verify doctor name is displayed with Dr. prefix
steps:
1. Login
2. Check for doctor name on home tab
actual_result: Doctor name with prefix found: True

description: Verify all 6 tissue modules are displayed in the grid
steps:
1. Login
2. Check for tissue module cards
expected_result: All 6 tissue modules visible (Breast, Thyroid, GIT, Soft Tissue, Head & Neck, Lungs)

description: When no patient is selected, a prompt banner is shown
steps:
1. Login (no patient session)
2. Check for prompt

description: Verify desktop sidebar navigation is present
expected_result: Sidebar element exists on desktop viewport

description: Verify HistoQuanta logo is in the sidebar
Verify Home tab button exists in sidebar
Click Search tab in sidebar loads patient search
steps:
1. Click sidebar-tab-1
2. Check for Patient Search heading

description: Click Add Patient tab in sidebar loads registration form
steps:
1. Click sidebar-tab-2
2. Check for Patient Registry content

description: Click Profile tab in sidebar loads doctor profile
steps:
1. Click sidebar-tab-3
2. Check for profile content

description: Verify 'Clinical Analysis Modules' section heading on home tab
steps:
1. Navigate to home tab
2. Check for heading

description: Verify 'Breast Cancer' tissue card is visible on home
steps:
1. Navigate to home tab
2. Check for tissue-breast element

description: Verify Patient Search tab loads
Verify search input field is present
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for input

description: Verify search input has meaningful placeholder text
actual_result: Placeholder: 'Search by name, ID, diagnosis, or report type...'

description: Verify refresh button is present on search tab
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for refresh button

description: Search for non-existent name shows no results
Verify patient count is displayed on search tab
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for count text

description: Verify either patient list or empty state is shown
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check content area
expected_result: Either patient cards or 'No patients' message

description: Clearing search input restores full patient list
Verify patient cards display avatar initials
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for avatar elements
expected_result: Avatar elements present in patient cards

description: Verify 'Select' buttons are present for each patient
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for Select buttons
expected_result: Select buttons visible for patient cards

description: Verify delete buttons exist for patient management
steps:
1. Navigate to search tab
2. Check for delete buttons

description: Verify Add Patient tab loads with Patient Registry form
Verify patient ID is auto-generated and read-only
steps:
1. Navigate to Add Patient
2. Check first disabled input
expected_result: Patient ID field is disabled with auto value

description: Verify patient name field is present
Verify patient age field is present
Verify gender dropdown has Male, Female, Other options
Verify phone number field is present
Verify address field is present
Verify report type field is present
Verify 'Save Patient & Report' button is present
Saving without required fields shows validation error
steps:
1. Clear name, age, gender
2. Click save

description: Name field only accepts letters (strips digits via onChange)
expected_result: Digits are stripped, only letters remain

description: Phone field only accepts digits and limits to 10
steps:
1. Type mixed chars in phone
2. Check value

description: Verify attachments section with Add Scan/Document buttons
Register a new patient and save details successfully
steps:
1. Fill in all fields
2. Click Save Patient & Report
expected_result: Patient registered successfully, success message shown

description: Verify doctor profile tab loads
Verify 'Edit Profile' toggle button is present
steps:
1. Navigate to Profile
2. Check for edit toggle

description: Clicking Edit Profile shows editable form fields
steps:
1. Click 'Edit Profile'
2. Check for name input

description: Clicking Cancel returns to view mode
expected_result: Returns to view mode (edit fields hidden)

description: Verify 'Log Out' button is present
steps:
1. Navigate to Profile
2. Check for logout button

description: Verify 'My Downloads' link is in settings section
steps:
1. Navigate to Profile
2. Check for Downloads link

description: Verify 'Privacy Policy' link in settings
Verify 'Terms & Conditions' link in settings
Verify 'About HistoQuanta' link in settings
Verify contact info displays License, Email, Phone
Verify large profile avatar is displayed
steps:
1. Navigate to Profile
2. Check for avatar-xl element

description: Visiting / redirects to /dashboard or /login
Unknown route redirects to dashboard
Verify /privacy-policy page loads
Verify /terms-and-conditions page loads
Verify /about page loads
Verify /downloads page loads
Unauthenticated access to /patient/:id redirects to login
Unauthenticated access to /downloads redirects to login
Browser back button navigates to previous page
Verify the browser tab has a page title
Verify Breast module page loads with marker options
expected_result: Breast module page with ER/PR/HER2/Ki67 options

description: Verify ER Allred scoring page loads with dropdowns
Verify ER intensity scoring dropdown is present
steps:
1. Navigate to ER form
2. Check for intensity label

description: Verify ER proportion scoring dropdown is present
steps:
1. Navigate to ER form
2. Check for proportion label

description: Verify ER score and inference (Positive/Negative) are displayed
steps:
1. Navigate to ER form
2. Check for score and inference
